messages.content:
I can’t see your location or live web data from here, so I can’t tell the current weather unless you give me a place (city, ZIP, or lat/lon). Tell me where and I’ll look up or format a query.

Quick options you can use right now:

- Very quick (no API key): in a browser or terminal:
  - curl wttr.in/<location>?format=3
  - Example: curl wttr.in/London?format=3

- Free JSON API (no key) using coordinates — example (San Francisco):
  - curl "https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=37.7749&longitude=-122.4194&current_weather=true"

- If you prefer a mainstream source, search in Google or a phone weather app for “weather [city]”.

Tell me a city/ZIP or coordinates and whether you want a short summary or full JSON, and I’ll provide the current conditions formatted for you.

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
